news.title:
Wockhardt's antibiotic Zaynich gets CDSCO's expert committee recommendation.
Zaynich showed strong efficacy, safety in trials; positive step for final approval.
news.summary:
Wockhardt's antibiotic Zaynich gets CDSCO's expert committee recommendation.
Zaynich showed strong efficacy, safety in trials; positive step for final approval.

news.title: Wockhardt reports Q3 revenue at 8.9B INR, up from 7.2B YoY, showing strong growth.
news.summary: Wockhardt reports Q3 revenue at 8.9B INR, up from 7.2B YoY, showing strong growth.

news.title:
Wockhardt shares surged 611% over three years despite modest 4.9% annual revenue growth.
Shareholders gained 24% annually over five years, though underperforming the market last year.
news.summary:
Wockhardt shares surged 611% over three years despite modest 4.9% annual revenue growth.
Shareholders gained 24% annually over five years, though underperforming the market last year.

news.title:
Wockhardt targets ₹1,000 crore opportunity in India with new antibiotic WCK 4282, post successful Phase 3 trials.
WCK 4282 addresses drug resistance; regulatory filing with DCGI planned. Global focus remains on Zaynich with US approval expected mid-year.
news.summary:
Wockhardt targets ₹1,000 crore opportunity in India with new antibiotic WCK 4282, post successful Phase 3 trials.
WCK 4282 addresses drug resistance; regulatory filing with DCGI planned. Global focus remains on Zaynich with US approval expected mid-year.

news.title: Wockhardt's antibiotic Foviscu WCK 4282 met the primary endpoint in Phase 3 trial.
news.summary: Wockhardt's antibiotic Foviscu WCK 4282 met the primary endpoint in Phase 3 trial.

news.title:
Wockhardt's antibiotic Foviscu matches Meropenem in Phase 3 trials with 93.2% cure rate.
Foviscu targets drug-resistant bacteria, potentially reducing carbapenem overuse and addressing resistance.
news.summary:
Wockhardt's antibiotic Foviscu matches Meropenem in Phase 3 trials with 93.2% cure rate.
Foviscu targets drug-resistant bacteria, potentially reducing carbapenem overuse and addressing resistance.

news.title:
Wockhardt discusses its breakthrough antibiotics and future growth strategies with Dr. Habil Khorakiwala.
The company highlights Zaynich's progress and approvals from USFDA and EMA.
news.summary:
Wockhardt discusses its breakthrough antibiotics and future growth strategies with Dr. Habil Khorakiwala.
The company highlights Zaynich's progress and approvals from USFDA and EMA.

news.title:
Wockhardt submits WCK 5222 marketing application to European Medicines Agency.
This step advances Wockhardt's innovative treatment towards the European market.
news.summary:
Wockhardt submits WCK 5222 marketing application to European Medicines Agency.
This step advances Wockhardt's innovative treatment towards the European market.

news.title:
Glenmark inked a $700M licensing deal with Abbvie for a blood cancer drug.
The deal, led by Glenmark's US unit, highlights Indian drug innovation success.
news.summary:
Glenmark inked a $700M licensing deal with Abbvie for a blood cancer drug.
The deal, led by Glenmark's US unit, highlights Indian drug innovation success.

news.title: Wockhardt recovers from early losses, gaining over 3% and hitting the day's high.
news.summary: Wockhardt recovers from early losses, gaining over 3% and hitting the day's high.

news.title: Wockhardt expects European approval for Zaynich by July-August, says Chairman Habil Khorakiwala.
news.summary: Wockhardt expects European approval for Zaynich by July-August, says Chairman Habil Khorakiwala.

news.title:
Wockhardt's WCK 5222 receives Accelerated Assessment eligibility from EMA.
The combination includes Zidebactam 1g and Cefepime 2g after EMA pre-submission meeting.
news.summary:
Wockhardt's WCK 5222 receives Accelerated Assessment eligibility from EMA.
The combination includes Zidebactam 1g and Cefepime 2g after EMA pre-submission meeting.

news.title:
Wockhardt receives Fast Track Review from European Medicines Agency for WCK 5222.
This marks India's first new drug seeking pan-European approval.
news.summary:
Wockhardt receives Fast Track Review from European Medicines Agency for WCK 5222.
This marks India's first new drug seeking pan-European approval.

news.title:
In 2025, the BSE Healthcare Index fell 1.5%, underperforming Sensex's 8.4% gain due to sector pressures.
Glenmark struck a $700M deal with AbbVie, while Wockhardt's NDA for Zaynich marked a milestone for Indian pharma.
news.summary:
In 2025, the BSE Healthcare Index fell 1.5%, underperforming Sensex's 8.4% gain due to sector pressures.
Glenmark struck a $700M deal with AbbVie, while Wockhardt's NDA for Zaynich marked a milestone for Indian pharma.

news.title: Wockhardt Ltd announces EMA grants accelerated assessment to WCK 5222.
news.summary: Wockhardt Ltd announces EMA grants accelerated assessment to WCK 5222.

news.title:
Indian Pharma stocks surged on Friday, with Nifty Pharma index gaining over 1% post US BIOSECURE Act inclusion in NDAA.
Wockhardt led gains (+6.5%), followed by Divi's, Laurus Labs, Aurobindo, and Biocon (2-3.5%). Macquarie prefers Divi's and Syngene.
news.summary:
Indian Pharma stocks surged on Friday, with Nifty Pharma index gaining over 1% post US BIOSECURE Act inclusion in NDAA.
Wockhardt led gains (+6.5%), followed by Divi's, Laurus Labs, Aurobindo, and Biocon (2-3.5%). Macquarie prefers Divi's and Syngene.

news.title:
Indian pharma exports hit $30B in FY25, with medicines reaching 200+ markets, including stringent ones like the US.
Key players like Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr Reddy's drive exports, while Wockhardt gains USFDA NDA for Zaynich antibiotic.
news.summary:
Indian pharma exports hit $30B in FY25, with medicines reaching 200+ markets, including stringent ones like the US.
Key players like Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr Reddy's drive exports, while Wockhardt gains USFDA NDA for Zaynich antibiotic.

news.title:
Wockhardt establishes three new step-down subsidiaries in Switzerland and the USA.
The move aims to expand Wockhardt's global presence and operational capabilities.
news.summary:
Wockhardt establishes three new step-down subsidiaries in Switzerland and the USA.
The move aims to expand Wockhardt's global presence and operational capabilities.

news.title:
Wockhardt Bio AG established 3 subsidiaries in Switzerland and USA.
Capital of CHF 100K and USD 100K invested; entities aim to market antibiotics.
news.summary:
Wockhardt Bio AG established 3 subsidiaries in Switzerland and USA.

news.title:
Patanjali Foods, RBL Bank, Wockhardt, MCX, Suzlon Energy led gains as Nifty rose 0.59% & Sensex 0.54%.
RBI's 25 bps repo rate cut boosted rate-sensitive stocks with Nifty PSU Bank up 1.55% & IT, Metal indices rising.
news.summary:
Patanjali Foods, RBL Bank, Wockhardt, MCX, Suzlon Energy led gains as Nifty rose 0.59% & Sensex 0.54%.
